title: BetterHotbar
description: Allows for better hotbar/inventory management with a controller. Could also be used with mouse and keyboard!
body:
ABOUT THE MOD:

Taking inspiration from other mods like Better Than Adventure and the slightly outdated HotbarCycle mod. I wanted to make a mod that improves Minecraft's inventory management without actually needing to open the players inventory constantly, improving the flow of building, especially with controller. Also offers customization and can change the location on the HUD of where all of the below elements are on the screen.

4 Main Features:

Row Indicator - Taking inspiration from Better Than Adventure, shows the current hotbar or row, that is currently selected. Allows you to set a keybind to cycle through rows of your inventory.
Column Preview - View all of the items in a certain "column" of your inventory. Also, able to set a keybind to cycle through items in that column.
Inventory Overlay - Get a quick glance of all the items in your inventory without needing to pause your gameplay. Useful for building to know which items are in which hotbar.
Customizable Mod Menu - Includes mod menu in order to turn features on/off, increase/decrease the size of these features, modify on an X/Y-axis the placement of these features, and modify the transparency of each of these features.
NOTE: Set a keybind in order to open the mod menu, all keybinds are left blank by default. I am also not sure how to add labels to the settings for showing Size X-Axis, Size Y-Axis, Placement X-Axis, Placement Y-Axis.

Screenshots were taken inside of the Re-Console+ modpack.
